creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
Created attachment 252669
Patch lua-resty-core 0.1.28 -> 0.1.29

Patch in attachment.
Since the latest nginx releases, the lua stream module no longer compiles due to

  src/ngx_stream_lua_module.c:867:5: error: unknown type name ‘ngx_stream_ssl_conf_t’; did you mean ‘ngx_stream_addr_conf_t’?

(ngx_stream_ssl_conf_t has been renamed in nginx).
The lua-resty-core version remains at 0.1.29rc1. This is an unfortunate situation (needing what is named an "rc") but rather critical for us.
